hero.title: Helping students learn, lead, and grow together.
hero.description: Fun Club is a student-led organization dedicated to helping children develop English language skills, confidence, leadership, and academic success through engaging educational activities, community service, and mentorship.

news.title: Interactive English Lessons
news.description: Students practiced English vocabulary through games, speaking exercises, and visual activities that encouraged participation and confidence.

news.title: Family Vocabulary Workshop
news.description: Students learned family-related vocabulary using songs, pictures, and interactive classroom discussions.

news.title: Online Learning Session
news.description: Students practiced speaking and listening skills together while participating in interactive online activities.

news.title: Building Confidence in English
news.description: Students participated in activities designed to strengthen pronunciation, listening, and everyday communication skills.

news.title: Learning Through Games
news.description: Educational games helped students review vocabulary while encouraging teamwork, attention, and active participation.

news.title: Creativity Meets Language Learning
news.description: Students expressed creativity while reinforcing English vocabulary and sentence writing through drawing activities.

programs.title: English Learning
programs.description: Vocabulary, speaking, reading, writing, and confidence-building activities.

programs.title: College Readiness
programs.description: Future planning, resumes, scholarships, and career exploration.

programs.title: Leadership
programs.description: Teamwork, communication, planning, and student-led projects.

programs.title: STEM Activities
programs.description: Coding, technology, creativity, design, and problem-solving.
